- `[20:06]` **🏛️监管 | Unixell Biotech 的同种异体 iPSC 衍生细胞疗法 UX-GIP001 获得 FDA IND 批准，用于治疗局灶性癫痫**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Unixell Biotech receives IND clearance by FDA for its Allogeneic iPSC-Derived cell therapy, UX-GIP001, for focal Epilepsy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:30]` **ImmunityBio 通过大规模 NK 细胞生产和冷冻保存 60 多名健康和癌症捐赠者实现里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *ImmunityBio Achieves Milestone with Large-Scale NK Cell Production and Cryopreservation from Over 60 Healthy and Cancer Donors* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
